title: Duplicate File Check
summary: Before modifying ANY file, search for duplicates with the same name; modify only the canonical file and delete duplicates.

title: Path Alias Verification
summary: Always verify path aliases in vite.config.js before assuming @feature/x resolves to a given path.

title: Import Existence Check
summary: Never import files that do not exist; validate with npm run build before pushing.

title: Hook Declaration Order
summary: Declare React hooks in order: States → useMemo → useEffect → Handlers. Wrong order causes TDZ ReferenceError.

title: LogForm Dual Return Type
summary: LogForm returns Array when type==='plan' and Object when type==='protocol'. Always check Array.isArray(logData) before processing.

title: Timezone — Local Dates
summary: ALWAYS use parseLocalDate() or new Date(str + 'T00:00:00'). NEVER use new Date('YYYY-MM-DD') — creates UTC midnight = wrong day in GMT-3.

title: Zod Enums in Portuguese
summary: All Zod schema enum values must be in Portuguese. Always export labels for UI display.

title: Dosage in Pills, Not Milligrams
summary: quantity_taken must be in pills (Zod limit: 100), never in milligrams.

title: Operation Order for Doses
summary: Always follow Validate → Record → Decrement for dose registration. Never decrement stock before validating and recording.

title: Daily PDF Adherence Must Count Dose Events
summary: In the clinical PDF daily table, count completed vs expected dose events per day; exclude future scheduledDoses. Do not reuse monthly aggregate totals.

title: Fallback Patient Identity From Email Handle
summary: If no display name, derive PDF patient label from email local-part before falling back to 'Paciente'.

title: Reuse Shared Patient Identity Helpers
summary: Always reuse src/shared/utils/patientUtils.js for patient display fallback. Do not re-implement local helpers.

title: Consultation Summary Must Count Actual Doses Taken
summary: Use dose-count metric (taken) as numerator for taken/expected. Keep takenAnytime only for secondary insights.

title: Callback Data < 64 Bytes
summary: Use numeric indices in callback_data, not UUIDs. Store full mapping in session.

title: MarkdownV2 Escaping
summary: Always use escapeMarkdownV2() for MarkdownV2 messages. Escape backslash FIRST. Do NOT escape answerCallbackQuery text.

title: shouldSendNotification() Includes Logging
summary: shouldSendNotification() calls logNotification() internally. Never call logNotification() explicitly after — causes duplicate logs.

title: Vercel API Rewrites
summary: Always add explicit rewrites in vercel.json for new API routes. Catch-all must be LAST. Use :id syntax for dynamic params.

title: No process.exit() in Serverless
summary: Never use process.exit() in Vercel serverless functions. Use throw new Error() instead.

title: Service Role Authentication
summary: Any endpoint using service_role key (bypasses RLS) MUST have authentication via Supabase Auth + ADMIN_CHAT_ID.

title: JSDoc in Portuguese
summary: All JSDoc comments must be in Portuguese from the first commit.

title: Validate Before Push
summary: Run validate:quick during development; run validate (all tests) before creating a PR.

title: No Self-Merge for Code Agents
summary: Never allow a code agent to merge its own PR. Code creates PR → review → DevOps merges only after explicit approval.

title: Mandatory Review Pause
summary: Always pause for review between coding tasks. Never create sequential tasks without validation gates.

title: Quality Over Speed
summary: One well-reviewed PR is worth more than 3 rushed PRs. Gemini Code Assist review is non-negotiable.

title: Process as Protection
summary: Never skip workflow steps 'just this once'. Process violations compound into production failures.

title: Read Memory Before Coding
summary: Every agent MUST load the relevant .agent/memory indexes before writing any code.

title: No setTimeout in act() Blocks
summary: Never use setTimeout inside act() to wait for components. Use waitFor(() => expect(...)) instead.

title: Mock External Services in Hook Tests
summary: Hook tests rendering a Provider that calls Supabase/API MUST mock those services with vi.mock() at module level.

title: Always Resolve Dangling Promises
summary: When a test creates a manually-controlled Promise, ALWAYS resolve it in a finally block to prevent Vitest hangs.

title: Use Fake Timers for Timer-Dependent Tests
summary: Use vi.useFakeTimers() and vi.runAllTimersAsync() for deterministic timer control. Always restore in afterEach.

title: Use validate:agent for Agent Sessions
summary: Agents MUST use npm run validate:agent (10-min kill switch). Never use validate:quick or validate:full from agent sessions.

title: Low-RAM Test Compatibility
summary: All tests must pass on 8GB RAM via npm run test:lowram. Split test files >300 lines by scope.

title: Disable localStorage in Tests
summary: Skip localStorage persistence in test env (NODE_ENV === 'test') to save ~200MB memory.

title: Cancel setInterval in Tests
summary: Global setIntervals MUST be cancellable. Export cancelGarbageCollection()/restartGarbageCollection() and call in beforeAll/afterAll.

title: Aggressive Test Cleanup
summary: afterEach must call: clearCache(), vi.clearAllMocks(), vi.clearAllTimers(), optionally global.gc().

title: Split Test Files by Scope
summary: Test files >300 lines must be split by feature/hook/component. Each file tests ONE logical unit.

title: Cache Architecture Optimizations
summary: queryCache OOM fixes (2026-02-23): generation counter, TTL eviction, debounced persistence, LRU reset, stable queriesKey, deduplication.

title: Test Suite Performance Strategy
summary: Choose test command by context: test:fast (dev), test:lowram (8GB), validate:agent (agents — MANDATORY), validate:full (CI).

title: Zod-SQL Schema Synchronization
summary: Zod schemas and DB schemas MUST be synchronized. Any CHECK/NOT NULL/enum in DB must have corresponding Zod validation. Update both in the same commit.

title: Environment Variable Fallbacks
summary: Always provide fallbacks for env vars that may have alternative names (VITE_* vs unprefixed) across environments.

title: Private Storage Authentication
summary: Always include auth headers when accessing private storage (Vercel Blob, S3). Never assume public access.

title: Nullable Schema Fields
summary: Use .nullable().optional() in Zod when a field can receive null from APIs/databases. .optional() alone rejects null.

title: Serverless Response Format
summary: In Vercel serverless functions, always use res.status(code).json(body). Never use Express-style res.json() without explicit status.

title: Structured Logging from Day One
summary: Implement structured logging (timestamp, level, context, correlationId) from the first commit of any API endpoint.

title: Pre-Deployment Environment Checklist
summary: Before deploying any new API endpoint, validate ALL required env vars exist in target environment with a startup check.

title: Database Column Existence Check
summary: When writing INSERT statements, verify all columns exist in the target table. Never assume based on docs — check actual schema.

title: Vercel Hobby 12-Function Limit
summary: Vercel Hobby allows max 12 serverless functions. Every .js in api/ counts (except _-prefixed dirs). Verify budget before creating new files.

title: Underscore Prefix for API Utilities
summary: Helper files in api/ MUST be in _-prefixed directories. Without prefix, Vercel counts them as serverless functions.

title: Spec Path Verification Before Edit
summary: Before editing any file referenced in a spec, always verify the actual path with find. Specs often reference canonical paths that differ from reality.

title: ESLint Unused Vars — Remove, Don't Alias
summary: When a destructured prop/variable is unused, remove it entirely. Do NOT use _prefix aliasing — varsIgnorePattern doesn't reliably cover aliased destructuring.

title: CSS Selector Over getByText for Non-Unique Text
summary: When asserting on text that may appear in multiple DOM elements, use container.querySelector('.class').textContent instead of screen.getByText().

title: Wave 1 Component Purity — No Context Imports
summary: All Wave 1 (Onda 1) components must receive data ONLY via props. Never import useDashboardContext or any feature context in Onda 1.

title: Framer Motion SVG — Set strokeDashoffset in Both style and initial
summary: For SVG motion.circle with strokeDashoffset animation, set value in BOTH style (static CSS) and initial/animate. Without style, browser renders full ring before Framer Motion takes control.

title: CSS color-mix() Progressive Enhancement
summary: When using color-mix() for backgrounds, wrap in @supports with a graceful fallback. Safari < 16.2 does not support color-mix().

title: DoseZoneList Adapter Pattern — Interface Mismatch
summary: When a new component has a different callback interface than existing handlers, create thin adapter functions. Do NOT refactor existing handlers.

title: selectedMedicines useState Position — Known Tech Debt
summary: selectedMedicines useState in Dashboard.jsx is at line ~535 (after handlers), violating States-first order. Do NOT move without a dedicated refactor PR.

title: Multiple useDashboard() Calls are Safe
summary: Multiple components calling useDashboard() is safe. React Context consumers always receive the same object reference — no performance penalty.

title: DoseZoneList Internal Sub-components
summary: DoseCard and ZoneSection are internal sub-components of DoseZoneList, NOT exported. No use outside DoseZoneList.

title: SwipeRegisterItem onRegister vs onRegisterDose Mismatch
summary: SwipeRegisterItem calls onRegister(medicineId, dosage). DoseZoneList needs onRegisterDose(protocolId, dosage). Use closure wrapper.

title: Props Passadas mas não Declaradas na Assinatura São Silenciosas
summary: Uma prop passada no JSX mas ausente no destructuring da função é silenciosamente ignorada — sem erro em runtime. Listar TODAS as props interativas no destructuring.

title: || vs ?? para Valores Numéricos com Zero Válido
summary: Use ?? (nullish coalescing) when 0 is a valid value. || treats 0 as falsy and replaces with fallback — incorrect behavior.

title: Remover Dead Code Imediatamente ao Substituir Seções
summary: Ao substituir uma seção JSX por novo componente, remover simultaneamente: props antigas, useMemos/states relacionados, imports não usados.

title: Testes com Date Devem Usar setHours (não UTC Hardcoded)
summary: Ao criar datas de referência em testes com horas locais, NUNCA usar timestamps UTC fixos — produzem horas locais diferentes por timezone. Use setHours() local.

title: useState não Reage a Mudanças de Prop Derivada — Usar useEffect
summary: useState(() => derivedValue) usa o initializer APENAS na montagem. Se derivedValue pode mudar, adicionar useEffect para sincronizar.

title: Page Visibility API para Pausar Intervals em Abas Inativas
summary: setInterval continua em abas não visíveis. Usar visibilitychange para pausar/retomar e atualizar estado ao voltar à aba.

title: key={controllingProp} para Reinicializar Estado Interno
summary: Quando estado interno é inicializado com base em prop e deve reinicializar quando a prop muda, usar key={controllingProp} no JSX para forçar remount.

title: Guard Clauses AFTER All Hooks
summary: Early returns with guard clauses MUST come AFTER all hook declarations (States → Memos → Effects → Handlers). Placing guard clause before hooks causes 'React Hook called conditionally' error.

title: Use calculateExpectedDoses() for Protocol Consumption
summary: Always use calculateExpectedDoses(protocols, days) from @utils/adherenceLogic. calculateDailyIntake() ignores frequency and causes inflated estimates for non-daily protocols.

title: Adherence Must Sum quantity_taken, Not Count Logs
summary: Calculate adherence as sum(quantity_taken)/expected*100, NOT count(logs)/expected*100. A patient taking 2 pills/dose shouldn't have 50% when taking 1 log/day.

title: Filter Logs by protocol_id Only, Never by medicine_id
summary: Filter logs using ONLY log.protocol_id === protocolId. Never add OR with medicine_id — 2+ protocols may share the same medicine.

title: Zero Hours on Date Boundaries for Timezone Consistency
summary: When setting date boundaries for filtering, call .setHours(0,0,0,0) to prevent off-by-one errors when comparing local dates with ISO-string UTC timestamps.

title: React Virtuoso for Long Lists on Mobile
summary: Lists with 30+ items on mobile should use react-virtuoso instead of .map(). Configure: useWindowScroll, overscan=300, endReached. Wrap items with React.memo.

title: Console Logs for Development Debugging
summary: Manter logs detalhados é obrigatório. Cada operação crítica deve ter console.log/error com contexto detalhado. Não remover logs ao mergear.

title: Lazy Views + manualChunks for Code Splitting
summary: All non-critical views MUST use React.lazy() + import(). Combine with vite.config.js manualChunks for vendor/feature isolation.

title: Redesign CSS Color System
summary: All color values in components.redesign.css MUST come from CSS variables (--color-*). Never hardcode hex or rgba. Use color-mix() for derived variations.

title: Button Size Class Preservation
summary: min-height and padding MUST be ONLY in size classes (.btn-sm, .btn-md, .btn-lg). Never put in variant classes (.btn-primary, .btn-danger).

title: CSS Selector Consolidation Pattern
summary: When 2+ classes share >80% of styles, consolidate via selector grouping (,). Separate only size/state modifiers.

title: Zod Validation for Service Parameters
summary: ALL service functions accepting input params MUST validate with Zod safeParse() + schema. Never use manual typeof/Array.isArray() checks.

title: Extract Functions at 30-Line Threshold
summary: If a function exceeds 30 lines, extract pure helpers. Functions >30 lines are harder to test, understand, and reuse.

title: Cache SWR para Queries de Adesão
summary: Queries do adherenceService DEVEM usar cachedAdherenceService. Keys: adherence:summary:{period}, adherence:daily:{days}, adherence:pattern.

title: Serializar Queries Supabase em Views Mobile
summary: Views mobile-critical NUNCA devem disparar >4 requests Supabase simultâneos. Usar fases: UI-blocking (max 2) → requestIdleCallback → IntersectionObserver.

title: Select Mínimo em Queries Supabase para Listas
summary: Queries para listas DEVEM selecionar apenas colunas usadas no render. Resultado: ~76-80% redução de payload em timelines.

title: Promise Coalescence para Auth Roundtrips
summary: Funções que fazem HTTP roundtrip para auth (getUser(), getSession()) DEVEM implementar coalescência: se já há chamada em voo, reutilizar a mesma promise.

title: String Comparison para Datas em Hot Loops
summary: Em loops com >100 iterações sobre datas YYYY-MM-DD, usar comparação de strings (dateStr < startStr) ao invés de new Date(). Strings YYYY-MM-DD são lexicograficamente ordenáveis.

title: Zod Validation em TODOS os Métodos de Leitura de Services
summary: Não validar apenas métodos de escrita. Métodos de leitura (get/list/getByRange) também DEVEM ter schemas Zod validando parâmetros.

title: parseLocalDate em TODAS as Queries de Data ao Supabase
summary: Queries Supabase com filtros de data DEVEM converter datas locais para UTC via parseLocalDate(). NUNCA usar template T00:00:00.000Z — ignora fuso horário.

title: Logging em api/*.js para Visibilidade Vercel
summary: Estruturar logs no entry point api/*.js, NÃO em server/bot/**. Node.js server context é invisível para Vercel logging (VMs diferentes).

title: Inspect Component Prop Interface Before Copying
summary: Antes de reutilizar/copiar um componente entre contextos, SEMPRE ler a assinatura de destructuring para confirmar os props esperados. Não assuma nomes por semântica.

title: Validate Context Hook Return Types
summary: Quando usar dados de hook context, sempre ler o JSDoc do hook para saber quais propriedades retorna. Não assuma nomes baseado em semântica.

title: Prefer Direct Actions Over Modal Flows for Common Operations
summary: Ações frequentes e simples devem usar 1-click direto (inline validation + service call + feedback). Modals devem ser reservados para operações complexas/multi-step.

title: Callback Batch Operations Must Match UI Promise
summary: Batch callbacks (onRegisterAll) MUST register ALL selected items. If UI says 'Confirmar 3 doses', implementation must process all 3.

title: Font Weight Accessibility
summary: NUNCA use font-weight < 400 (thin/light). Pacientes idosos não conseguem ler fontes finas. Mapear light=400, thin=400.

title: Icon-Text Pairing
summary: lucide-react icons NUNCA aparecem sozinhos. SEMPRE acompanhados de texto label. Exception: icon-only MUST have aria-label + title.

title: Font @import Scoping Strategy
summary: Google Fonts SEMPRE via CSS @import em token files (scoped), NUNCA via <link> em index.html (global). Fonts ficam scoped ao [data-redesign='true'].

title: Heading Hierarchy Variables
summary: TODOS os níveis h1-h6 DEVEM ter variáveis específicas de size + weight em CSS tokens. Sem variáveis → hard-coded values → inconsistência em redesigns futuros.

title: Centralize PDF Layout Geometry
summary: Em geradores de PDF, coordenadas, offsets, larguras e alturas DEVEM ser extraídas para constantes nomeadas. Sem números mágicos inline.

title: Framer Motion Cascade Re-Triggering via Key Remounting
summary: Para re-triggerar animações cascade quando dados mudam, forçar remount via key prop. Não confie em initial/animate state changes sozinhos.

title: Domain-Aware Case Conversion for Autocomplete Data
summary: Aplicar case conversion baseado em semântica do domínio: Names/User-visible → Title Case; Classifiers/Metadata → Sentence Case.

title: Full Object Fetch for Edit Workflows
summary: Em edit flows, NUNCA editar dados agregados/simplificados. Buscar a entidade completa do banco antes de abrir o form de edição.

title: Compute State-Specific Aggregations, Not Just Primary State
summary: Ao agregar dados por state (active/paused/finished), computar grupos para TODOS os estados. Lazy computation por state causa missing data ao mudar de view.

title: Modal Component Consistency — Use Shared Modal
summary: Ao implementar modals, sempre usar o <Modal> compartilhado do projeto. Nunca criar overlay divs customizados. Shared modal tem Esc key handling, backdrop e animações consistentes.

title: isComplex = mode !== 'simple'
summary: O único ponto de bifurcação de persona é isComplex = mode !== 'simple'. O modo 'moderate' não existe. CSS gerencia densidade por grid responsivo.

title: Dona Maria quer hierarquia, não menos dados
summary: Em isComplex=false, nunca remover dados por reflexo. Perguntar: o dado informa uma ação ou apenas contextualiza? Se só contextualiza, remover ou traduzir em linguagem humana.

title: Reutilizar StockPill para qualquer status de estoque
summary: StockPill (src/features/protocols/components/redesign/StockPill.jsx) é o componente universal de status de estoque. Nunca criar badge de status novo.

title: PriorityDoseCard registra TODOS os doses da faixa
summary: PriorityDoseCard recebe doses={urgentDoses} sem slice. Display limita a 3 internamente (DISPLAY_LIMIT). CTA 'Confirmar Agora' registra TODOS, não apenas os visíveis.

title: AdherenceLabel usa linguagem humana (não %) para modo simple
summary: Em isComplex=false, usar AdherenceLabel (não AdherenceBar7d). Thresholds: >90% 'Tratamento em dia', 70-90% 'Algumas doses perdidas', 50-70% 'Tratamento em risco', <50% 'Muitas doses perdidas'.

title: Weekly Audit: Web/Bot Code Drift
summary: Auditar semanalmente divergências entre lógica do Telegram bot (server/bot/) e web app (src/features/). Bot deve usar exatamente os mesmos RPCs e services. Drift silencioso causa bugs em produção (ex: FIFO stock restoration).

title: Monorepo workspace packages: use dependency ranges, not exact versions
summary: Avoid peer dep conflicts (ERESOLVE) by aligning with root + dev tool peer requirements
